summary: A service implementing CRUD operations for user data with in-memory storage, validation, and minimal functional scope.

groups.name: User CRUD Operations
groups.summary: Core CRUD functionality for user management

requirements.title: Create User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL create a user

acceptance.given: A user with valid `id`, `name`, and `email` fields
acceptance.outcome: The user is stored in the in-memory database
The operation fails with an error

requirements.title: Retrieve User by ID
requirements.statement: The system SHALL retrieve a user by ID

acceptance.given: A user exists in the in-memory database with a known `id`
acceptance.when: The read operation is invoked with the `id`

acceptance.given: A user does not exist in the in-memory database
acceptance.when: The read operation is invoked with a non-existent `id`
acceptance.outcome: The operation fails with an error

requirements.title: Update User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL update a user’s details

acceptance.given: A user exists in the in-memory database with a known `id`
acceptance.when: An update operation is invoked with new `name` or `email` values
acceptance.outcome: The user’s data is modified in the in-memory database

acceptance.given: An update attempt with invalid `email` format
acceptance.outcome: The operation fails with an error

requirements.title: Delete User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL delete a user by ID

acceptance.given: A user exists in the in-memory database with a known `id`
acceptance.when: The delete operation is invoked with the `id`
acceptance.outcome: The user is removed from the in-memory database

acceptance.given: A delete attempt for a non-existent `id`
acceptance.outcome: The operation fails with an error

requirements.title: Email Validation
requirements.statement: The system SHALL validate email format during creation and update

acceptance.given: A user attempt to create or update with an invalid `email`
acceptance.outcome: The operation fails with an error

acceptance.given: A user attempt to create or update with a valid `email`

requirements.title: In-Memory Storage
requirements.statement: The system SHALL use in-memory storage

requirements.title: No Authentication
requirements.statement: The system SHALL not require authentication

rules.rule: The user data structure SHALL include `id`, `name`, and `email`
rules.rationale: Defined by the product owner to ensure consistency

rules.rule: The email field SHALL adhere to a valid email format
rules.rationale: To ensure data integrity and usability

rules.rule: The system operates in a trusted environment
User identification is solely based on `id`
rules.rationale: As specified by the product owner
